prose: Frontier-orbital single-point calculation on ethylene (C₂H₄, 6 atoms: 2C + 4H) at the DFT level, tier 'standard' = B3LYP/def2-TZVP, using PySCF RKS with exact four-center integrals (density fitting OFF). Geometry: user-supplied ethylene.xyz, not re-optimized at this level (single point). Environment: gas phase. Charge: 0, multiplicity: 1 (closed-shell singlet). SCF converged in 6 cycles. No warnings reported. Headline result: HOMO–LUMO gap = 7.4357165 eV. HOMO = −7.6155818 eV; LUMO = −0.17986527 eV. These are Koopmans-theorem orbital energies, not vertical excitation energies. Integrity: trustworthy = true, status = ok. Output: ethylene_frontier_dft.json. Command: cli.py frontier ethylene.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1.
